findings.evidence: `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/Multiquadratic/Targets.lean:67` names Layer 1 prime-splitting; touched files include `TauCeti/NumberTheory/NumberField/MultiquadraticSplitting.lean` and `SplitsCompletely.lean`, whose grep hits show they implement that splitting law stack.
findings.fix: Add the roadmap claim explicitly, e.g. `TauCetiRoadmap/Multiquadratic/Targets.lean`, Layer 1 prime-splitting law, and say the changes repair the ramification/inertia API breakage in its splitting-completely stack.
findings.issue: The PR description only describes a mathlib bump and does not identify the roadmap target this maintenance preserves.

summary: The changes form one coherent mathlib-compatibility update and have a real proximate path to the Multiquadratic Layer 1 prime-splitting target, but the PR description does not state that roadmap path.
